instruction: Convert the shorthand clinical note into a structured summary.
input: Pt c/o SOB x3d, hx COPD, O2 sat 89% RA
output: Patient reports shortness of breath for 3 days with a history of COPD. Oxygen saturation is 89% on room air.

instruction: Convert the shorthand clinical note into a structured summary.

output: 45-year-old male presents with chest pain since this morning. Denies nausea or vomiting. Blood pressure is 150 over 95.

instruction: Convert the shorthand clinical note into a structured summary.
